Your EditionGuard API token.\n\n**How to:
Your EditionGuard API token.

**How to get your API token:**
1. Log in to your [EditionGuard dashboard](https://app.editionguard.com)
2. Go to **Settings** (top-bar menu)
3. Find the **API** section and copy your **Rest API Token**
Creates a transaction for an eBook and s: Creates a transaction for an eBook and sends the download link(s) to your customer. Returns the download link you can deliver by email or any other channel.

The customer's email address where the d: The customer's email address where the download instructions will be sent.
Your order or transaction reference numb: Your order or transaction reference number (e.g. from your eCommerce platform). Used for tracking and reporting.
Number of download links to generate. Us: Number of download links to generate. Use 1 for a single copy. Increase for multi-seat or multi-device licenses.
Only applies when the eBook uses **Socia: Only applies when the eBook uses **Social DRM (EditionMark)**. The customer's name will be embedded as a visible watermark in the eBook. Leave empty for Adobe DRM or Readium LCP books.
Only applies when the eBook uses **Social DRM (EditionMark)**. This email will be embedded as a watermark. Leave empty for Adobe DRM or Readium LCP books.
Only applies when the eBook uses **Social DRM (EditionMark)**. This phone number will be embedded as a watermark. Leave empty for Adobe DRM or Readium LCP books.
